sections.markdown:
- Activity: C2S arvo run
- Started: 2025-07-19 15:07
- Distance: 14.1 km
- Moving time: 1:19:54
- Elapsed time: 1:26:25
- Elevation gain: 230.6 m
- Average heart rate: 164.2 bpm
- Max heart rate: 179 bpm
- Average watts: 218.6 W
- Average speed: 10.6 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `6` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `163.4 bpm`, ranging from `142.4` to `174.9 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `154.5 bpm` and second-half average HR was `172.2 bpm` (+17.7 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `163.7 spm`, with a working range of `131.1` to `178.5 spm` after excluding `2` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `153.6 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `172.6 spm` (+19.0 spm), which suggests turnover lifted rather than falling away.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:41 /km` across `14.066 km` in `1:19:54` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:57 /km` and second-half pace was `5:25 /km` (-33 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `164.2 bpm` average and `179 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `156.2 bpm` in the first half and `171.6 bpm` in the second (+15.4 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `1:19:54` out of `1:26:25` elapsed (92.5%), which shows some stop-start interruption.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `11` stop segments and `1.3%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `244.6 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.8 m` and `83.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `153.4 m` in the first half and `91.2 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed earlier.
